title: infinite power
description: This is a mod where you can become an infinite number of superheros or supervillains
body:
⚡ PALLADIUM: INFINITE POWER ⚡
One Modpack. All Expansions. Unlimited Potential.

Step into a world where the rules are rewritten and power has no limits.
PALLADIUM: INFINITE POWER is the ultimate evolution of the legendary modpack—packed with every official expansion and tuned for total domination.

⚙️ Fuse cutting-edge tech with ancient magic
🔋 Harness unstoppable energy
🌌 Conquer new dimensions
⚔️ Build, battle, and ascend

Whether you’re engineering world-shaping machines, mastering elemental sorcery, or leading your faction across realms—Infinite Power gives you the tools, the freedom, and the firepower to rise above gods.

FEATURES:
	•	🧱 Every Palladium expansion in one mega-pack
	•	⚡ Infinite energy systems & hybrid tech-magic builds
	•	⚔️ Overpowered weapons, legendary gear & massive automation
	•	🌍 New dimensions, elite bosses & endgame content
	•	🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Multiplayer-ready for PvP, factions, or co-op empires

No limits. No compromises. Just raw, untamed power.
Are you ready to ascend? 🚀


https://discord.gg/GNQqS5VYbH
